assumptions: Existing users collection has required fields (email, name)
Courses and lessons collections exist and can be modified
Admin authentication is already in place
CSV export capability can be added
review_questions: Should codes be single-use (one code per student) or multi-use (same code for multiple students)?
Should the code gate apply to courses only, lessons only, or both?
Should there be an expiration date for codes?
Should admins be able to deactivate codes after creation?
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 16 (new collections + admin + frontend + analytics across 2+ modules). Risk: 12 (auth integration, DB changes, access control). Novelty: 16 (new feature pattern). Cross-domain: 10 (backend + frontend + admin). Ambiguity: 2 (very clear spec). Dependencies: 6 (users, courses, lessons). Total: 62

input_quality.reasoning: Input contains detailed requirements with clear user flows, admin requirements, and success criteria. Has ## numbered sections but lacks implementation steps. Promoted spec.md.
